title: Modular Tram Tracks
description: Modular Tram Tracks for Minecraft Transit Railway 4.x
body:
![Two parallel rail tracks stretching towards a sunset, the left with a counter rail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/58q363Vx/images/f54b146405174fb515368bdfafb1e0a54b16806b.png)

This resourcepack adds some modular tracks to [Minecraft Transit Railway 4.x](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) _(required)_. These are centered around everyones favourite mode of transit: Trams! This Pack also includes some other tracks like 3rd rails commonly found in metros and deco objects such as a fitting buffer stop.

Content in v0.5:
## Track modules
- tram Rails
- tram Rails with Gutter
- rusty Tram Rails
- rubber sleepers
- wooden sleepers
- concrete sleepers
- concrete sleepers (worn)
- iron V sleepers
- cobblestone cover
- asphalt cover
- brick cover
- 3rd rail
- 3rd rail (inverted)
- Bare 3rd rail
- Bare 3rd rail (inverted)
- 4th rail
- check rail
- check rail (inverted)
- cables
- counter rails
- maintenance walkway
- maintenance walkway (inverted)
- walkway railing
- walkway railing (inverted)
- MSD rigid catenary (Height 4)
- MSD rigid catenary (Height 5)

## Objects
- counter rail ends
- buffer stop

# Dependencies
- [Minecraft Transit Railway 4.x](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) _(required)_
